project_type: TypeScript monorepo (pnpm workspaces + Turborepo) with 13 apps and 37 packages
build_system: pnpm@10.28.1 + Turborepo, strict TypeScript with noUnusedLocals/noUnusedParameters
verification_instructions: 1. Run NODE_OPTIONS="" npx vitest run to confirm tests pass. 2. Run npx tsc --noEmit on new packages to verify TypeScript.
environment_constraints: COMMON_DEPENDENCIES network mode. Can install npm packages. No docker daemon expected for testing.
contribution_requirements: TypeScript strict mode, ESM modules, Vitest for testing, pnpm workspaces
key_patterns: Each package has package.json with scripts (typecheck, test), vitest.config.ts, tsconfig.json. Existing packages/testing has src/core/ modules and src/types.ts with comprehensive type exports from src/index.ts. Existing .github/workflows/security-scan.yml has Trivy+CodeQL+ZAP. Existing CI at ci.yml.
directory_structure: Root: apps/ (13 apps), packages/ (37 packages including testing, auth, payments, security), services/, .github/workflows/, infra/. packages/testing/src/core/ has existing test framework modules.
